title: Fat Chickens
description: Makes chickens FAT. They are very big now, good luck fitting them in your house.
body:
![Fat chickens](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ca6ae9028fd4548d658a4371fa74a713a14671f4.png)**This resource pack swaps out the regular chicken models and textures for these huge, super chunky ones. Turning your chickens into the chunkiest pets without touching any other mobs or gameplay. Turn your chickens fat today!**
 
### Dependencies:
### [EMF] Entity Model Features
### [ETF] Entity Texture Features
